source:
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server"; import { redirect } from "next/navigation"; import { Card } from "@/components/ui/card"; import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge"; import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"; import { CheckCircle2, User, Ticket, ChevronLeft } from "lucide-react"; import { formatDate } from "@/lib/utils/format"; import Link from "next/link"; import { ConfirmVisitButton } from "@/components/md/ConfirmVisitButton"; export default async function MDTransactionsPage() { const supabase = await createClient(); // 1. 유저 확인 const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser(); if (!user) redirect("/login"); const { data: userData } = await supabase .from("users") .select("*") .eq("id", user.id) .single(); if (userData?.role !== "md") redirect("/"); // 2. 예약 내역 조회 (결제 완료 이상) const { data: transactions } = await supabase .from("transactions") .select(` *, auction:auction_id (*, club:club_id(*)), buyer:buyer_id (name) `) .eq("md_id", user.id) .in("payment_status", ["paid"]) .order("created_at", { ascending: false }); return (

예약 관리

대기 중인 예약

{transactions && transactions.length > 0 ? ( transactions.map((tx) => (
결제완료 #{tx.reservation_code}

{tx.auction?.club?.name} {tx.auction?.table_type}

방문일

{formatDate(tx.auction?.event_date)}

구매자

{tx.buyer?.name}

전화번호

미제공 옵션

 )) ) : (

관리할 예약 내역이 없습니다.

)}
); }
